scripts.dev-as-root: WEBPACK_FLAGS=-d go generate && go get ./... && sudo $GOPATH/bin/boot
scripts.dev-docker: WEBPACK_FLAGS=-d go generate && go get ./... && docker build --tag=arvados-boot-test-runit testimage_runit && docker run --rm -it --publish=18500:18500 --cap-add=IPC_LOCK --cap-add=SYS_ADMIN --volume=/sys/fs/cgroup --volume=${GOPATH}/bin/boot:/usr/bin/arvados-boot:ro arvados-boot-test-runit
